title: HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-7pm, Friday 1pm-5pm. On-demand testing outside scheduled testing times may be arranged by contacting Prevention Manager or Outreach Coordinator. Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in during clinic hours. Call or visit website for testing schedule. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEPATITIS C CASE MANAGEMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY
